member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.AuthResponseDto
member.summary: Authentication result containing a JWT access token and the authenticated user profile.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.AuthResponseDto.Token
member.summary: Signed JWT access token to send in the Authorization header.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.AuthResponseDto.TokenType
member.summary: Token type for Authorization header construction.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.AuthResponseDto.ExpiresAtUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp indicating when the access token expires.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.AuthResponseDto.User
member.summary: Profile information for the authenticated user.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto
member.summary: Request payload for obtaining a JWT bearer token.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto.Email
member.summary: Registered email address for the account.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto.Password
member.summary: Plain-text password for the account.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequestDto
member.summary: Request payload for registering a new helpdesk end user.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequestDto.FullName
member.summary: Full display name for the user account.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequestDto.Email
member.summary: Unique email address used for sign-in.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequestDto.Password
member.summary: Plain-text password that will be hashed by ASP.NET Core Identity.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.UserProfileDto
member.summary: Basic identity and authorization information for an authenticated user.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.UserProfileDto.Id
member.summary: Unique user identifier from ASP.NET Core Identity.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.UserProfileDto.FullName
member.summary: Display name shown in helpdesk responses.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.UserProfileDto.Email
member.summary: Primary sign-in email address.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Auth.UserProfileDto.Roles
member.summary: Role claims currently assigned to the user.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Common.PaginatedResponseDto`1
member.summary: Standard wrapper for paginated list responses.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Common.UserLookupDto
member.summary: Lightweight user lookup item for assignment and selection UIs.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.AddCommentRequestDto
member.summary: Request payload for adding a discussion comment to a ticket.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.AddCommentRequestDto.Content
member.summary: Human-readable comment content visible in the ticket timeline.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.AssignTicketRequestDto
member.summary: Request payload for assigning a ticket to an agent.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.AssignTicketRequestDto.AgentUserId
member.summary: Identity user id of the target agent.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.CreateTicketRequestDto
member.summary: Request payload for creating a new helpdesk ticket.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.CreateTicketRequestDto.Title
member.summary: Short summary of the issue.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.CreateTicketRequestDto.Description
member.summary: Detailed problem description for agents and auditors.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.CreateTicketRequestDto.Priority
member.summary: Business impact or urgency level selected by the requester.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto
member.summary: Query parameters for paginating, filtering, searching, and sorting ticket lists.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto.Search
member.summary: Optional keyword search across ticket title and description.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto.Status
member.summary: Optional workflow status filter.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto.Priority
member.summary: Optional urgency filter.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto.AssignedToUserId
member.summary: Optional filter for the currently assigned agent.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto.CreatedByUserId
member.summary: Optional filter for the ticket creator.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto.SortBy
member.summary: Sort field for the result set.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto.SortDirection
member.summary: Sort direction for the result set.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto.PageNumber
member.summary: One-based page number.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListQueryRequestDto.PageSize
member.summary: Number of items to return per page.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketListResponseDto
member.summary: Summary ticket response optimized for paginated list endpoints.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.TicketResponseDto
member.summary: Full ticket detail response including comments and audit history.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.UpdateTicketRequestDto
member.summary: Partial update payload for editable ticket fields.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.UpdateTicketRequestDto.Title
member.summary: Updated ticket title when the original summary needs refinement.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.UpdateTicketRequestDto.Description
member.summary: Updated ticket description with additional operational detail.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.UpdateTicketRequestDto.Priority
member.summary: Updated priority when business impact changes.

member.name: T:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.UpdateTicketStatusRequestDto
member.summary: Request payload for moving a ticket through the helpdesk workflow.

member.name: P:SecureHelpdesk.Application.DTOs.Tickets.UpdateTicketStatusRequestDto.Status
member.summary: Target status for the ticket. Valid transitions are enforced server-side.
